title: Message Level 64: All System Calls Uniface Sends to Operating System
breadcrumbs: Message Level 64: All System Calls Uniface Sends to Operating System
text: Message Level 64: All System Calls Uniface Sends to Operating System These messages show all the system calls, or subprocesses that Uniface starts at the operating system level, such as spools, spawns, and so on. For example, you can use this message level to track what happens to print files, because the spawned command appears in the message frame. Uniface also reports any file which cannot be opened at operating system level. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
